panel.title: CodexBar Noctalia
panel.runtimeBroken: CodexBar CLI cannot run because runtime dependencies are missing.

settings.title: CodexBar Noctalia settings
settings.description: Configure the CodexBar CLI command used to fetch AI usage data. On Linux, use cli or api source; web and auto are macOS-only.
settings.codexbarPathDescription: Command or absolute path used for usage polling.
settings.installDirDescription: Directory used by the built-in installer/updater.
settings.sourceDescription: Linux-supported sources. Use cli for Codex/Claude CLIs or api for API-backed providers.
settings.providerDescription: Provider id, such as all, codex, claude, gemini, copilot.
settings.includeStatusDescription: Also ask CodexBar for upstream status page data.

errors.parseStatus: Failed to parse CodexBar CLI status
errors.parseUsage: Failed to parse CodexBar usage JSON
